---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Lyrie Agent
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What pain point are you experiencing?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Use Case

How would you use this feature? Give a concrete example.

## Package

Which package(s) would this affect?

- [ ] `@lyrie/core` — Engine, memory, shield, tools
- [ ] `@lyrie/gateway` — Telegram, Discord, WhatsApp
- [ ] `@lyrie/ui` — Dashboard
- [ ] `@lyrie/shield` — Rust security engine
- [ ] New package

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references.
